/usr/bin/cc -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/pubsub/publish.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/pubsub/subscribe.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/pubsub/server.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/pubsub/serverUtils.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/pubsub/collection.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/pubsub/publishUtil.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/pubsub/subscribeUtil.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/config/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/config/printer.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/config/free.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/utils/toml.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/utils/dotenv.c.o CMakeFiles/opcua_pubsub.dir/src/utils/nodeIdMap.c.o -o opcua_pubsub  /usr/local/lib/libopen62541.a -lpthread -lm -lrt
